entry.title: New IDC N6134019D1006 awarded to DYNCORP INTERNATIONAL LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Ordering procedures are found in Section H.1 CMMARS Task Order Procedures clause.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CONTRACTED MAINTENANCE, MODIFICATION, AIR CREW, AND RELATED SERVICES

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N6134019D1006 (P00001) awarded to DYNCORP INTERNATIONAL LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Ordering procedures are found in Section H.1 CMMARS Task Order Procedures clause.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE THE WIDE AREA WORK FLOW (WAWF) CLAUSE (DFARS 252.232-7006) AND CORRECT DEFENSE FINANCE AND ACCOUNTING SERVICES (DFAS) PAYMENT LOCATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
